title: n_bonnie2's Alternate Unobtrusive Explosion
description:
Explosions getting in the way? No problem!
(still a bit obtrusive tho)
body:
# n_bonnie2's Alternate Unobtrusive Explosion
_(this pack supports Minecraft: Java Edition 1.14+)_

This resource pack retextures the explosion particles for better visibility.
I made this initially so I can see where I'm going while using the [Spirit Sceptre]([https://wiki.hypixel.net/Spirit_Sceptre](https://wiki.hypixel.net/Spirit_Sceptre)) in Hypixel Skyblock.

I decided to make this pack public because I thought it would be useful for things like End Crystal PVP or anything using Explosions in general.

## Comparison
![Comparison](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/underscoreBon/underscoreBon/refs/heads/main/explodecomparisonpack.gif)
